content.claim: When a church actor seeks to assume maintainer rights of a state-run school, more than half of parents must support the transfer, per the state secretary's procedural statement; uptake of this safeguard for village schools threatened by depopulation has not been evidenced.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Procedural rule stated by ministry, not quoted from statute
Application specifically to depopulation-closure scenarios not demonstrated in sources
Distinct from minority self-government maintenance route
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
